guideline: Maximum transit time for good delivery
model_implication: near_expiry threshold ≈ 2/3 of model shelf life; warm-transit near→spoiled rate = 0.28/step
source: USDA AMS PACA Good Delivery Guidelines, Potato section

model_implication: is_refrigerated=True on edges → cold_slowdown=0.35× aging rates
source: USDA AMS PACA Good Delivery Guidelines

condition: ≤ 4% serious damage by count for U.S. No. 1 grade
model_implication: Spoilage above this threshold → rejection (unmet demand); modelled as near_expiry→spoiled transition

condition: 10–15°C for chip-stock to prevent sugar conversion
model_implication: Non-refrigerated transit on processor edges; warm aging rates apply
source: USDA AMS PACA Good Delivery Guidelines, Processor Potato section

guideline: Maximum time in warm conditions before quality loss
model_implication: Warm near→spoiled rate calibrated: unit completes transition in ~3-4 steps at warm rate (0.28/step)
source: USDA ARS Agricultural Handbook 66 (2016); PACA inspection standards

model_implication: Cold aging rate: 0.28 × 0.35 = 0.098/step; unit reaches near_expiry after ~22 steps
source: USDA ARS Agricultural Handbook 66, Table on Potato Storage
